description: Mervia AI builds conversational commerce agents that make merchants discoverable and shoppable inside AI assistants such as ChatGPT, Claude, and Gemini. Its website describes a platform connecting business catalog data to AI-driven shopping conversations.
summary: Mervia.ai publicly exposes an unauthenticated MCP server endpoint for an Ovios Home shopping agent; no public REST, GraphQL, or CLI developer surfaces were found.
